DatasetTitle: NS-SEC BY RELIGION OR RELIGION BROUGHT UP IN BY SEX
Annotations: 1. For 'Long-term unemployed' year last worked is 2009 or earlier.; 2. In the NS-SeC classification, all full-time students are recorded in the 'Full-time students' category regardless of whether they are economically active or not.; 3. 'Religion' indicates religion, religious denomination or body.; 4. 'Catholic' includes those who gave their religion or their religion brought up in as Catholic or Roman Catholic.
